name: @kepello/nodegraph-analyzer-dotnet
description: C# / .NET analyzer subprocess for @kepello/nodegraph-analysis. Walks C# source via Roslyn and emits structural elements (classes, methods, properties, edges), size observations, per-method scalars (cyclomatic / cognitive / Halstead inputs), and intra-class accessesField/callsMethod edges (LCOM4 input) over the analyzer NDJSON protocol. Wraps a managed .NET binary; requires the .NET 9 runtime to be installed on the user's machine.
author: Carl Lance
